# Screen Contracts

## `home`

Purpose: orient a guest and offer inspectable public items. Entry is the public-home journey. The primary exit is `open-detail`; browser refresh must restore the public home without inventing account state. The required `home-loading` state keeps layout stable and announces progress. Controls are limited to those represented by manifest action IDs.

## `detail`

Purpose: show the selected item and keep recovery local to that context. Entry occurs through `open-detail`. The `detail-error` state explains the failed load, preserves which item was selected, and exposes only the contracted `retry-detail` action. Retry invokes `load-detail`, shows progress, and restores the same detail rather than navigating elsewhere.

## Flow boundary

The P0 sequence is `home` → `open-detail` → `detail`; `retry-detail` recovers `detail-error`. Mobile and desktop are responsive derivations of the same two surfaces, not separate product contracts.
